PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi sp, zero, 380  00010111110000000000000100010011
0x0004		addi s0, zero, 1    00000000000100000000010000010011
0x0008		srl s0, s0, s0      00000000100001000101010000110011
0x000c		addi s0, s0, 1      00000000000101000000010000010011
0x0010		addi t6, zero, 16   00000001000000000000111110010011
0x0014		addi t5, zero, 0    00000000000000000000111100010011
0x0018		add s0, s0, s0      00000000100001000000010000110011
0x001c		addi t5, t5, 1      00000000000111110000111100010011
0x0020		bne t5, t6, shift_loop11111111111111110001110011100011
0x0024		addi s1, zero, 7    00000000011100000000010010010011
0x0028		addi s2, zero, 1    00000000000100000000100100010011
0x002c		addi s3, zero, 1    00000000000100000000100110010011
0x0030		addi s4, zero, 2    00000000001000000000101000010011
0x0034		addi t0, zero, 0    00000000000000000000001010010011
0x0038		sw s2, 0(s0)        00000001001001000010000000100011
0x003c		addi t0, t0, 4      00000000010000101000001010010011
0x0040		sw s3, 0(s0)        00000001001101000010000000100011
0x0044		addi t0, t0, 4      00000000010000101000001010010011
0x0048		beq s4,s1,exit      00000010100110100000001001100011
0x004c		add t1, s2, s3      00000001001110010000001100110011
0x0050		add t2, s0, t0      00000000010101000000001110110011
0x0054		sw t1, 0(t2)        00000000011000111010000000100011
0x0058		addi t0, t0, 4      00000000010000101000001010010011
0x005c		add s2, s3, zero    00000000000010011000100100110011
0x0060		add s3, t1, zero    00000000000000110000100110110011
0x0064		addi s4, s4, 1      00000000000110100000101000010011
0x0068		beq zero,zero,loop  11111110000000000000000011100011
0x006c		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
